title: Crosshair Item Count
description: Display the most common itemstack in view (chests, barrels, etc.) under the crosshair, with quantity.
body:
🧿 Crosshair Item Count

> No more opening every chest to find what you need — with Crosshair Item Count, just look at a container and instantly see the most common item inside displayed under your crosshair, along with its quantity. Perfect for quick storage scans, sorting systems, or looting on the go.

🔍 Features

- Shows the most frequent itemstack in chests, barrels, and more

- Item icon and count appear subtly under your crosshair

- Works in both survival and creative modes

🧰 Lightweight and Compatible
- Designed to be non-intrusive and play nice with other HUD or performance mods.

🎯 Perfect For
Organized builders, redstone engineers, or anyone tired of guessing what’s in that box.
